papers.title: On the Scalability of Transformer Attention

annotations.quote: most production systems still truncate or chunk their inputs
annotations.contextBefore: This cost dominates training budgets for context windows beyond about sixteen thousand tokens, and is the reason
annotations.note: Which production systems? Name two or three, or soften the scope.

annotations.quote: A more balanced evaluation would weight retrieval-heavy tasks more heavily than is currently standard.
annotations.contextBefore: benchmarks that do not stress long-range retrieval.
annotations.note: This claim would benefit from a citation to the benchmark-design literature.
